zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Clevedon於1425年出生在法國奧維坎塔爾馬利特時，她的父親Sir John de Clevedon26歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley23歲。她於1445年與Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿瑟爾哈普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1485年9月14日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾恩波利享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Clevedon于1425年出生在法国奧維坎塔爾馬利特时，她的父亲Sir John de Clevedon26岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley23岁。她于1445年与Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton在英国英格兰多瑟特阿瑟爾哈普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1485年9月14日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾恩波利享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clevedon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Cleverdon in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Clevedon was born in 1425, in Mallet, Cantal, Auvergne, France, her father, Sir John de Clevedon, was 26 and her mother, Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton in 1445, in Athelhampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 14 September 1485, in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Clevedon est née en 1425, à Mallet, Cantal, Auvergne, France, son père, Sir John de Clevedon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton en 1445, à Athelhampton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 septembre 1485, à Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Clevedon 1425 in Mallet, Cantal, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Clevedon 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley 23. Sie hat 1445 in Athelhampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. September 1485 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Clevedon è nata il nel 1425 nel Mallet, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Sir John de Clevedon, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton nel 1445, nel Athelhampton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 settembre 1485, nel Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clevedonが1425年にフランスアウバーグンカンタルマレットで生まれた時，父Sir John de Clevedonは26歳，母Mary Elizabeth Stewkeleyは23歳であった。1445年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアスエルハンプトンでSir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhamptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1485年9月14日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアソルンブリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clevedon(이)가 1425년 프랑스 오버그니 캔탤 맬렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Clevedon(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 앳헬함프턴에서 Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토른버이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Clevedon nasceu em 1425, em Mallet, Cantal, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Sir John de Clevedon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton em 1445, em Athelhampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1485, em Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Clevedon родилась в 1425 г. в местности маллет, канталь, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Sir John de Clevedon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton в 1445 г. в местности ателхамптон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 14 сентября 1485 г. в местности таурнбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Clevedon nació en 1425, en Mallet, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Sir John de Clevedon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Stewkeley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Martin Baron of Athelhampton en 1445, en Athelhampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1485, en Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
